PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
    PsiElement($)('$')
    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiErrorElement:'=' unexpected
    PsiElement(=)('=')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
  PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
    PsiElement(()('(')
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('END')
    PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('This')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('is')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('the')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('text')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('that')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('gets')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('assigned')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('to')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', '[', and, in or or expected, got '.'
        PsiElement(.)('.')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('And')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)

    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('too')
      PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '(', '*', '+', '-', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', CONSUMES, PRODUCES, '[', and, in, or or '{' expected, got '.'

  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')

    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')

The escaped end of line joins the long line into one.\n | - END\n\n$a = @(Verse 8 of The Raven)\n  Then this ebony bird beguiling my sad fancy into smiling,\n  By the grave and stern decorum of the countenance it wore,\n  `Though thy crest be shorn and shaven, thou,'')

  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''\n  | Verse 8 of The Raven\n\nfoo(@(FIRST), @(SECOND))\n  This is the text for the first heredoc\n    FIRST\n  This is the text for the second\n    SECOND\n\nfoo(@(FIRST),\n  This is the text for the first heredoc\n  FIRST\n@(SECOND))\n  This is the text for the second\n  SECOND\n\n$a = @(END).upcase()\n  I am not shouting. At least not yet...\n  | END\n\nnotice @(BOM)\nasdfaasdf asdf\nasdfdsfas asdfasdf\n    BOM\n\nnotice @(BOM)\nBOM\n\nnotice @(BOM)\n    BOM\n\n\n\nnotice @(BOM)\nasdfaasdf asdf\nasdfdsfas asdfasdf\n  |-   BOM\n\nnotice @(BOM)\n|-BOM\n\nnotice @(BOM)\n  | -  BOM')
